meta.title: Opinion 62: Transfer of the Type Species of the Genus Methanococcus to the Genus Methanosarcina as Methanosarcina mazei (Barker 1936) comb. nov. et emend. Mah and Kuhn 1984 and Conservation of the Genus Methanococcus (Approved Lists, 1980) emend. Mah and Kuhn 1984 with Methanococcus vannielii (Approved Lists, 1980) as the Type Species
